name: @tishlang/tishdoc-parse
description: TishDoc parse pipeline: frontmatter, includes, Markdown+directives → AST

scripts.build: tish build --target js --no-optimize src/main.tish -o dist/tishdoc-parse.js && TISH_EXPORT_OUT=dist/tishdoc-parse.js TISH_EXPORT_NAMES=parseDocument,stringifyDiagnostics,stringifyAst node scripts/append-exports.mjs
scripts.test: tish run test/run_tests.tish && tish run test/golden_note.tish && tish run test/markdown_blocks.tish && tish run test/markdown_document.tish && tish run test/include_resolve.tish && tish run test/meta_imports.tish
